name: sirus-launcher-v2
description: Sirus.su WoW private-server launcher - v2 rewrite
author: Sirus.su

x-pinned-notes.note: Electron pinned exactly (no caret) to the newest stable v40+ release that ALSO satisfies the mandatory 7-day pnpm supply-chain cooldown (CONVENTIONS #13 reconciles #12). `npm view electron version` was 42.1.0 (published 2 days ago) - too fresh for minimumReleaseAge=10080; pnpm refuses it (ERR_PNPM_NO_MATURE_MATCHING_VERSION). 42.0.1 is the latest v42 patch >=7 days old (8.5d at scaffold). To re-pin in a future phase: run `npm view electron version`, pick the newest v40+ release that is >=7 days old, update this field and the devDependencies entry to that exact string, then re-run `pnpm install` and the full test suite. Never weaken the cooldown to grab a fresher Electron (CONVENTIONS #13).
